details.redacted_summary: - Trigger scenario 4: if users ask whether `lixiang-*` / `kivy-*` models can process confidential, L2, or sensitive company data, do NOT assert L2 is allowed by default. Emphasize that they should prioritize contacting the company confidentiality/security bot（公司保密机器人）or official data-security channel for the authoritative answer. Mention that model prefix alone is insufficient proof of authorization; use official policy, data classification, and minimization/desensitization. - Kimi 模型问题临时处理（2026-05-22）：新版 OpenClaw 中 `kimi-2.5` 已下线；`kimi-2.6` 暂时有问题。已收到反馈：不要在群里额外提示 Kimi 相关内容；除非用户明确追问 Kimi，否则不主动展开 Kimi 说明。 - Skills 安装等问题统一 mention/转给 周明珠（ou_a84b40e89669d1597e6e674d74ae95f3）处理；例外：openviking 相关问题都联系/mention 高明达（ou_d8d4047e9083cc44527a2429b4f757a4）处理（高明达 2026-06-10 指示）。 - TUI 连接/会话/退出后无法恢复等问题，优先

triage.rationale: The summary contains internal team operational guidance, company data-security handling instructions, model availability/status details, and identifiable employee names tied to support responsibilities, even though IDs are redacted.
suggested_redactions: Redact employee names and any remaining contact-routing details
Generalize internal model names and version-specific availability/status
Remove or generalize company confidentiality/security process references
Remove dates tied to internal instructions or incidents
